text: Hello. Hi, this is Harper with U.S. medical supplies, I hope I caught you at a good time. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. Do you have diabetes? No. And I don't need to run. [BLANK_AUDIO]
